tools.name: search_prompts
tools.description: Search the Wikiprompt catalog of 900+ curated AI prompts. All filters combine. Returns compact rows with the canonical URL; call get_prompt with a slug for the full prompt text.

tools.name: get_prompt
tools.description: Fetch one prompt in full by slug (or UUID): complete prompt text, structured metadata (model, prompt type, style, quality assessment), author, media and source attribution. Optional locale (es, pt, fr, zh, de, ja) returns the translated version.

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: List the 9 Wikiprompt categories with live prompt counts.

tools.name: list_facets
tools.description: List the searchable facet values with counts: AI models/tools, visual styles, and prompt types. Use these values in search_prompts filters.

tools.name: get_featured
tools.description: Get the editor-featured prompts (the best of the catalog).

tools.name: get_trending
tools.description: Get prompts trending right now (1000+ views in the last 7 days). May be empty when nothing crosses the threshold.

tools.name: get_recent
tools.description: Get the most recently added prompts, optionally filtered by category.

tools.name: random_prompt
tools.description: Get one random prompt from the catalog, optionally within a category.

tools.name: get_stats
tools.description: Get catalog statistics: total prompts, contributors, and the media/type breakdown.

tools.name: get_prompt_translations
tools.description: List the available translations of a prompt (locale + translated title).

tools.name: prompts_by_author
tools.description: List prompts contributed by a specific author handle (as shown on prompt pages).

tools.name: submit_prompt
tools.description: Submit a new prompt to Wikiprompt. Requires a wikiprompt API key (create one from your profile at wikiprompt.org). Pass it as the api_key argument or send an Authorization: Bearer header.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "submit_prompt" references sensitive artifacts (api_key, authorization, bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Submit a new prompt to Wikiprompt. Requires a wikiprompt API key (create one from your profile at wikiprompt.org). Pass it as the api_key argument or send an Au…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: search_prompts · Private data: submit_prompt · Public sink: submit_prompt.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: search_prompts · Private data: submit_prompt · Public sink: submit_prompt

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
